displayTitle: Tales of the Jedi: Redemption #4: The Trials of a Jedi
synopsis:
On Cathar's Vast Veldt, Sylvar hunts to purge her hatred of Ulic but finds no relief; when a scout brings word that Vima Sunrider has disappeared, she spares his life and leaves to aid Nomi. On Rhen Var, the powerless Ulic Qel-Droma teaches Vima to build her first lightsaber from her late father Andur's Adegan crystals and trains her in its use, marveling at her progress even as he doubts he has any right to teach her.

Reflecting on her own path, Nomi admits she was forced into the Jedi life by Andur's murder and regrets neglecting Vima, believing it fitting that Ulic is teaching her daughter the true cost of being a Jedi. Sylvar arrives and is appalled that Nomi would let a war criminal near her child, and storms off, only to be intercepted by Hoggon, who offers to lead her to Ulic. On Rhen Var, Ulic and Vima carve great ice sculptures with their lightsabers to honor Arca Jeth and Andur, and Vima tells Ulic that this proves he still has the heart of a Jedi. With the conclave over, Nomi departs to reclaim and train her daughter.
title: Tales of the Jedi: Redemption #4: The Trials of a Jedi
